name: testPlaceholdersAndSearchNpgwInAddAdjustment
description: Search by NPGW reference within Add adjustment dialog and check placeholders
descriptionHtml: Search by NPGW reference within Add adjustment dialog and check placeholders

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Search by NPGW reference within Add adjustment dialog and check placeholders

steps.name: Set start and end date: 14-07-2025 to 14-07-2025
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: check placeholder in the 'NPGW reference' search field.
Verify: check placeholder in the 'Business unit reference' search field.
Verify: The located reference matches the one entered in the search field.
